title: Ubiquiti UVC-G4-INS - UniFi Protect G4 Instant camera, 5MP, 2.8mm
description: UniFi Protect G4 Instant camera has 5MP sensor (2688 Ã 1512px) at 30 fps, fixed lens 2.8 mm , IR illuminator for night vision, microphone and speaker. The camera has a robust and compact body made of polycarbonate, IK04 resistance against vandals and IPX5 protection against splashing water. The camera is connected to the network using Dual-Band WiFi with support for 802.11a/b/g/n/ac standards, and power is provided via a USB-C cable (5 V/2 A ) with a maximum consumption of 6 W 5MP, 30 FPS video Night mode with IR LEDs IPx5 weatherproof cover Built-in microphone and speaker Power via USB-C Managed by UniFi Protect software - 1.20.0-beta5 (web) / 1.5.6 (iOS) / 1.4.7 (android) Resistance to vandals - IK04 Note: UniFI Protect is required to run this product with full functionality, we recommend using it with UniFi Dream Machine Pro or UniFi Protect Network Video Recorder Device Screws + dowels Plastic sheet for attaching to the wall USB-C cable
